## What's new

- Pause transitions now deliberately return to the original 4:3 presentation
  before the closing iris is drawn. The pause menu therefore has a fully black
  backdrop across the entire widescreen display instead of leaving live
  gameplay visible in the side wings.
- Resuming keeps the original presentation through the opening iris, then
  restores expanded gameplay before the first visible unpaused frame. The
  game no longer reopens in 4:3 and waits before returning to widescreen.
- The original pause animation and native 4:3 presentation remain unchanged.

## Validation

- Captured and inspected all 240 compositor frames around a normal-speed
  widescreen pause and resume transition.
- Confirmed that the first closing-iris frame already has black side wings and
  that the frame immediately after the opening iris is fully expanded.
- Captured and inspected a native 4:3 pause/resume run and passed all telemetry,
  controls, and session-log tests.

**Full changelog:** https://github.com/ThiagoLira/trouble-makers-pc-recomp/compare/v0.3.8...v0.5.0
